name: Law Offices of Chance M. McGhee | Bankruptcy Lawyer
description_short: San Antonio bankruptcy attorney offering Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filing services, foreclosure defense, and debt relief solutions for individuals in South Central Texas.
description_long:
Law Offices of Chance M. McGhee is a bankruptcy law firm based in San Antonio, Texas, founded by Attorney Chance M. McGhee, who serves as Director of the San Antonio Bankruptcy Bar Association. The firm has been helping clients throughout South Central Texas for over two decades, positioning itself as an experienced provider of bankruptcy and debt relief legal services.

The firm offers personalized bankruptcy representation across multiple chapters and debt scenarios. Primary services include Chapter 7 bankruptcy filing, Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing, home foreclosure defense, IRS tax levy resolution, wage garnishment relief, vehicle repossession prevention, and credit card debt management. The firm also provides bankruptcy alternatives counseling for clients who may not qualify for or benefit from formal bankruptcy protection. They conduct free initial consultations to assess each client's financial situation and recommend appropriate solutions.

Chance McGhee's leadership role in the San Antonio Bankruptcy Bar Association and the firm's 20+ year track record in the region distinguish it as an established local practice. The website emphasizes personalized, individualized case assessment rather than one-size-fits-all solutions, and explicitly states willingness to explore alternatives if bankruptcy is not suitable. The attorney and legal team commit to guiding clients through the entire bankruptcy process regardless of complexity.

The firm serves a broad geographic area across South Central Texas, including San Antonio, New Braunfels, San Marcos, and 16 named counties (Atascosa, Bandera, Bexar, Comal, Dimmit, Frio, Gonzales, Guadalupe, Karnes, Kendall, Kerr, Medina, Real, Wilson). However, as a law office rather than a financial services company, this service is limited to legal representation and consultation rather than broader financial counseling or debt management services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Director of San Antonio Bankruptcy Bar Association, indicating leadership credibility and expertise in local bankruptcy law
20+ years serving South Central Texas clients, providing established reputation and experience
Free initial consultation to assess financial situation and determine best solution
Explicit commitment to exploring bankruptcy alternatives if Chapter 7 or 13 aren't appropriate
Comprehensive practice areas covering foreclosure defense, wage garnishment, repossession, IRS tax levies, and credit card debt
Personalized individual case assessment rather than standardized approach
Wide service area covering 16 counties plus multiple cities in South Central Texas
Website includes educational content (FAQs, blog) on bankruptcy process and post-bankruptcy credit rebuilding
cons: Limited to San Antonio and South Central Texas geographic area—not available for clients outside this region
As a law firm, cannot provide ongoing financial counseling, debt management, or credit repair services
No pricing information or fee structure disclosed on website, requiring direct contact for cost assessment
No mention of payment plans or financing options for legal fees, which may be inaccessible for economically distressed clients
Website does not indicate whether attorney is Board Certified in bankruptcy law or holds additional specialized credentials
best_for: Texas residents facing foreclosure, repossession, wage garnishment, or tax liens who need legal representation
Individuals overwhelmed by credit card debt or medical bills seeking Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy protection
Homeowners in South Central Texas counties trying to prevent or manage home foreclosure
Consumers uncertain whether bankruptcy is appropriate who need professional legal assessment before deciding
diagnosis: Best for South Central Texas residents facing serious debt crises (foreclosure, repossession, wage garnishment, tax levies) who need legal representation to file bankruptcy or evaluate alternatives. Main caveat: this is a law firm providing legal services only, not a debt management or financial counseling company, and services are geographically limited to the San Antonio region and surrounding counties.
services: Credit card debt management and bankruptcy solutions
Creditor harassment and automatic stay protection
Medical bill debt resolution through bankruptcy
Asset protection planning in bankruptcy context
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
